LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiff Bank Of The Wests Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues Against Defendants Northfield Building Services Llc And Cecil Kelly
Off Calendar Apr-06-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2020 Continued To May-20-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Northfield Building Services Llc And Cecil King To Dismiss, Or Alternatively, Stay Action Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 410.30 & Payment Of Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CECIL KELLY, NORTHFIELD BUILDING SERVICES LLC'S Motion Of Defendants Northfield Building Services Llc And Cecil King To Dismiss, Or Alternatively, Stay Action Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 410.30.

Defendants Northfield Building Services LLC and Cecil Kelly's motion to dismiss or stay action based on forum non conveniens is denied. (see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
